# Phase 3 — rectangle long enough to force a cross-aisle. Exercises:
#   - graph auto-generation with both interior and cross aisles
#   - graph directive (summary, vertices, edges)
#   - graph SVG layer (blue=interior, brown=perimeter)

polygon outer
(0,0)
(400,0)
(400,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(400,160), area 64000

set stall-angle=90
----

set stalls-per-face=10
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 78
faces: 13 (boundary: 1, interior: 12)
graph: 24 vertices, 37 edges (perimeter: 18, interior: 19)
regions: 1
